rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LIZA DENISE SWIFT LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Compel Successor Trustee To File Accounting
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/19/25. Prior to review of the petition, the following must be addressed: 1) Venue must be addressed. Probate Code 17002 and 17005 must be discussed and the notice provided by the current trustee under Probate Code 16061.7 should be filed. 2) Petition must state the names and last known addresses of all beneficiaries, vested or contingent [CRC 7.902] and those entitled to notice [Probate Code 17201]. 3) Notice to all beneficiaries and all trustees is required under Probate Code 17203. 4) Proposed order must be filed. All documents to be filed by 3/3/25. Petitioner's email address should be listed in future pleadings.
